hero.copyHeading: Want to use this profile somewhere?
hero.copySubtext: Copy the full profile as Markdown — ready to paste into any doc or AI prompt.
hero.copiedSubtext: Paste it into any document, note, or AI tool.

mbti.aiNote: AI prediction — this result is inferred from values, behaviors, and identity data, not a self-reported test. The more input data PersonaMirror has, the more precise this prediction becomes.

INFJ.name: The Advocate
INFJ.description: Idealistic and principled — connects deep values to long-horizon vision, builds systems that serve people.

INTJ.name: The Architect
INTJ.description: Strategic and determined — turns complex systems into elegant, long-term plans.

INFP.name: The Mediator
INFP.description: Poetic and kind — driven by values and a deep desire to make the world better.

INTP.name: The Logician
INTP.description: Innovative and curious — endlessly analyzes ideas in pursuit of deeper truth.

ENFJ.name: The Protagonist
ENFJ.description: Charismatic and inspiring — leads people toward a shared, meaningful vision.

ENTJ.name: The Commander
ENTJ.description: Bold and decisive — naturally steps into leadership to drive progress.

ENFP.name: The Campaigner
ENFP.description: Enthusiastic and creative — sees life as full of exciting possibilities.

ENTP.name: The Debater
ENTP.description: Smart and curious — loves challenging ideas and sparking intellectual debate.

ISFJ.name: The Defender
ISFJ.description: Dedicated and warm — protects and supports the people they care about.

ISTJ.name: The Logistician
ISTJ.description: Practical and reliable — upholds tradition and duty with quiet determination.

ISFP.name: The Adventurer
ISFP.description: Flexible and charming — always ready to explore new experiences.

ISTP.name: The Virtuoso
ISTP.description: Bold and practical — masters tools and crafts with calm, hands-on expertise.

ESFJ.name: The Consul
ESFJ.description: Caring and popular — attentive to others' needs and eager to contribute.

ESTJ.name: The Executive
ESTJ.description: Excellent administrator — manages people and processes with clear principles.

ESFP.name: The Entertainer
ESFP.description: Spontaneous and energetic — brings fun and excitement wherever they go.

ESTP.name: The Entrepreneur
ESTP.description: Smart and energetic — thrives on living on the edge and solving problems in action.

vectors.subtitle: How strongly each internal drive shows up across values, behaviors, and life history. Scored 1–5.
vectors.aiNote: AI prediction — drive strengths are inferred from values, career patterns, and behavioral history, not a self-reported assessment. The more input data PersonaMirror has, the more precise these scores become.

sdg.aiNote: AI prediction — alignment is inferred from values, career history, and community activity, not a self-reported assessment. The more input data PersonaMirror has, the more precise this alignment becomes.

qa.title: Have a conversation
qa.description: Ask anything — the persona answers based on their values, experiences, and worldview.
qa.hint: Press Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
qa.errorMessage: Sorry, I couldn't answer that right now.

loginPrompt.message: Log in to ask this persona a question.
